item.title: Amazon's 8-pack of solar fence lights is just $25
item.description: "I have had these for a year now, and they work very well so far."

item.title: Big Four accounting chooses over humans, cuts benefits & hiring
item.description: Accounting used to be a career. It was long hours, but the promise of a six-figure salary, healthy benefits, and ownership in a firm. It was boring, b...

item.title: Applied Digital adds $1B in market cap on major announcement
item.description: Applied Digital (APLD) stock gained 12% on April 23 after reporting a 15-year, 300 megawatt lease for Delta Forge 1 from an unnamed U.S. hyperscaler. ...

item.title: Bank of America resets Intel stock price target after earnings

item.title: Amazon is selling a 2-in-1 laptop and tablet for $58 in 2 colors
item.description: It's perfect for entertainment and light computing tasks.
